nasb.text: Behold, I will gather them out of all the lands to which I have driven them in My anger, in My wrath and in great indignation; and I will bring them back to this place and make them dwell in safety.

esv.text: Behold, I will gather them from all the countries to which I drove them in my anger and my wrath and in great indignation. I will bring them back to this place, and I will make them dwell in safety.

cnv.text: ‘看哪！我曾在怒氣、烈怒和大忿怒中，把以色列人趕逐到各地，將來我必從那裡把他們招聚出來，領他們回到這地方，使他們安然居住。

ccb.text: ‘看啊，我极其愤怒地把他们驱散到各地，我也必招聚他们，领他们回到故土，使他们安居乐业。
